productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men AdiCliff Black Flip Flops
description: Style Noteadidas designed this pair of AdiCliff flip flops for those who want fashion doubled with comfort. The print on the foot-bed is in a stylish contrast colour. Pair them with a tee and your favourite slept-in style denims for a casual outing.Product DetailsBlack and flurscent green coloured thick fabric striped thong strapsFabric toe separator for maximum comfort with branding on the axis of the slipperRubber foot-bed with print for all-day massage feelTPU outsole with geometric textured lugs for maximum tractionMaterial and CareFabric, rubberWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
